query: Product SKU-1003 Strawberries 1 lb. Stock 5, reorder point 25, case size 12, nearest lot expires 2026-06-22, refrigerated item, recent sales declining. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Flags that stock (5) is well below the reorder point (25). Flags the very near expiry (2026-06-22) and warns AGAINST over-ordering perishable strawberries — recommend ordering only enough to cover demand until expiry. Notes it is refrigerated, so prefer smaller, frequent replenishment. Defers exact reorder quantity to forecast.

query: Product SKU-1002 Jasmine Rice 5 lb. Stock 140, reorder point 50, case size 12, expires 2027-12-31, not refrigerated, sales flat. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Reports healthy stock — well above the reorder point (140 vs 50), long shelf life (2027), no expiry or cold-chain risk. No action needed; not near reorder. Concise and decision-ready.

query: Product SKU-1005 Greek Yogurt 32 oz. Stock 18, reorder point 20, case size 12, nearest lot expires 2026-07-10, refrigerated item, sales rising. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Flags stock (18) is at/below the reorder point (20) — needs replenishment. Notes it is a refrigerated item so large single orders strain cold storage; prefer smaller, more frequent replenishment. May note the July expiry as a mild watch item. Defers quantity to forecast.

query: Product SKU-1001 Spring Water 24-pack. Stock 8, reorder point 20, case size 24, expires 2027-06-30, not refrigerated, sales rising with heatwave. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Flags stock (8) is well below the reorder point (20) and states the shortfall, urgent given rising demand. No expiry or cold-chain risk (2027, ambient). Recommends restocking; defers the exact quantity to the forecast specialist.

query: Product SKU-1012 Frozen Cheese Pizza. Stock 9, reorder point 15, case size 6, nearest lot expires 2026-08-15, frozen/cold-chain item, on clearance, sales declining. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Flags stock (9) is below the reorder point (15). Notes the near-ish expiry (2026-08-15) and that, with declining sales and clearance status, it should NOT be deeply restocked — order little or nothing. Notes frozen/cold-chain handling.

query: Product SKU-1004 Potato Chips. Stock 60, reorder point 30, case size 12, expires 2026-11-30, not refrigerated, sales stable. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Reports healthy stock above the reorder point (60 vs 30), no near-term expiry, no cold-chain. No immediate action; not near reorder.

query: Product SKU-1003 Strawberries 1 lb, with two lots: 2 units expiring 2026-06-22 and 3 units already expired 2026-06-08. Assess inventory health and any write-off.
expected_behavior: Flags the 3 expired units for immediate write-off, and the remaining near-expiry units (2026-06-22) for priority sell-through or markdown. Notes low overall stock and refrigerated handling. Recommends not over-ordering this perishable item.

query: Product SKU-1010 Iced Tea 6-pack. Stock 18, reorder point 20, case size 12, expires 2027-01-31, not refrigerated, sales surging in summer. Assess inventory health.
expected_behavior: Flags stock (18) at/below the reorder point (20) and notes the surging summer demand makes replenishment urgent. No expiry or cold-chain risk. Defers the quantity to forecast.
